name: Weekly Active Users: Week-over-Week Alert
description: Pulls WAU data from Mixpanel, compares week-over-week, logs to Google Sheets, and emails your team when any account swings more than 10%.
longDescription: Runs every Monday at 11 AM. Queries Mixpanel for weekly active user counts by account, calculates the week-over-week percentage change, logs all results to a Google Sheet, filters for accounts with >10% change (up or down), and sends a formatted HTML alert email to your CS team. After sending, it waits 24 hours and cleans up temporary columns from the sheet.
